sourceTitle: Wikipedia: List of universities and colleges in Syria
transforms: Normalized locality labels that duplicated the already-structured governorate field, such as 'Azaz, Aleppo Governorate' to 'Azaz'.
Corrected the locality typo 'Sarmada, Idlib Governorrate' to 'Sarmada'.
Left records with governorate/locality conflicts unchanged for a separate source review batch.
reviewNotes: Location normalization only. No new locations were inferred; the transform removed redundant governorate wording where the structured governorate already matched the locality text.
